title: Improve task filter accessibility semantics
description: Add ARIA state and descriptive labels to Workspace Tasks filter chips and clear-search controls so keyboard and screen-reader users can understand which filters are active and how to clear them.

title: Add tasks empty-column action copy
description: Make empty task columns explain their next action more clearly, especially on compact mobile layouts where the add button can be ambiguous.

title: Expose task board refresh status text
description: Add a small non-intrusive refresh status indicator for the task board so users know when background polling or manual refresh is happening.

title: Fix Vitest unit-test include/exclude baseline
description: Adjust Vitest configuration so Playwright E2E specs and Odysseus TAP .mjs suites are excluded from pnpm test and run only under their dedicated runners.

title: Add task board refresh status text
description: Show a subtle status line when Workspace Tasks is polling or manually refreshing so users know the board is updating in the background.

title: Improve compact task column labels
description: Add clearer empty-column and compact-column action labels for mobile and keyboard users, including accessible names for add buttons.

title: Clarify compact column drop targets
description: When a task is dragged over a compact empty column, expand the target with concise drop copy so users can tell exactly where the card will land.

title: Add focused test coverage for task column actions
description: Add component-level tests around compact and expanded task column add buttons so accessible labels and actions stay stable.

title: Fix Vitest collection baseline for E2E and TAP suites
description: Exclude Playwright e2e specs and Odysseus TAP .mjs tests from the default Vitest unit-test glob and document their dedicated runners.

title: Show task dependencies and blocked-state causes
description: Expose task prerequisite counts on cards and split blocked task stats into input-needed versus execution-error causes so operators know what to act on first.

title: Add configurable free retry model for task agents
description: When a task retry is needed, use a configurable fallback model with a free default instead of hardcoding a paid provider/model, preserving cost controls while improving reliability.

title: Archive stale untouched backlog tasks automatically
description: Move very old inactive backlog/todo tasks to done with an audit history entry so the deploy sweep stays focused on actionable work.

title: Add Execute Ready batch action for planned review tasks
description: Show a Tasks board action that starts execution for review-column tasks with real plans, backed by an authenticated batch API that limits concurrency and reports remaining work.

title: Deduplicate active task creation by normalized title
description: Prevent duplicate active tasks when the same title is submitted repeatedly by normalizing titles in the server task store before creating a new record.

title: Harden task execution readiness helper tests
description: Extract and test the logic that decides whether a review task has a usable execution plan so UI counts and batch execution stay aligned.

title: Show live progress after Execute Ready starts tasks
description: After batch execution starts, show a compact live progress region with how many spawned tasks are working, completed, or failed so the operator does not need to inspect cards manually.

title: Add focused API tests for tasks batch execution
description: Cover the tasks-batch-execute route with authorization, limit clamping, explicit task ID filtering, and no-plan exclusion cases.

title: Harden automated task execution preflight and progress reporting
description: Add gateway/OpenRouter preflight checks, configurable free-model execution defaults, concurrency guards, and long-running progress pings so task execution fails less silently and avoids overloading the VM.

title: Expose on-demand Telegram task board summary endpoint
description: Add an authenticated-friendly workspace API route that formats current task board health for Telegram, including running, ready, blocked, and dependency-waiting counts.

title: Treat stub execution plans as not ready
description: Require review tasks to have a substantive planned history note before showing Execute Ready or auto-starting execution, preventing one-line stubs from being executed as if they were real plans.

title: Document dedicated E2E and Odysseus test runners
description: Add workspace documentation that explains which commands should run Playwright E2E specs and Odysseus TAP tests separately from Vitest.

title: Add focused CI check for Vitest collection hygiene
description: Add a lightweight CI/script gate that lists collected Vitest suites and fails if e2e or services/odysseus TAP files re-enter the unit-test set.

title: Document dedicated workspace test runners
description: Add a short testing guide that distinguishes Vitest unit tests, Playwright E2E specs, and Odysseus TAP tests so future agents choose the right command first.

title: Reduce repository-wide ESLint baseline debt
description: Tackle the current repo lint baseline by prioritizing no-unnecessary-condition and no-control-regex errors outside actively changed files.

title: Add tests for Telegram task helper routes
description: Add focused API tests for tasks-create-from-tg, tasks-exec-log, tasks-unlock-prereq, and telegram-find routes to lock down authorization and response shapes.

title: Add task operations audit filters
description: Add UI filters for recently dispatched, timed out, rescued, and replanned tasks so operators can audit automated task operations without reading raw history entries.

title: Turn focused lint fallback into a package script
description: Add a workspace script that lints only changed source files with documented baseline-rule overrides, making auto-improvement verification repeatable and less ad hoc.

title: Archive unrelated untracked finance drafts outside src
description: Move experimental finance server drafts out of src until their dependencies and routes are ready, preventing unrelated untracked files from breaking TypeScript gates.

title: Consolidate Tasks screen utility helpers
description: Extract panel-state toggles, activity counters, and timeout-analysis shaping from tasks-screen.tsx into tested helpers to reduce the 3k-line component's render complexity.

title: Add visual regression smoke for Tasks toolbar panels
description: Capture desktop and mobile screenshots of Activity, Filter, More, Tags, Sister Load, and Rebalance panels so future compact-toolbar changes are validated beyond TypeScript and unit tests.

title: Reduce Tasks screen focused ESLint baseline debt
description: Fix no-shadow and no-unnecessary-condition warnings in tasks-screen.tsx so focused lint can run strict without disabling baseline rules during UI improvement cycles.

title: Split destructive task confirmations into reusable dialogs
description: Move clear-done, bulk-delete, prune-stale, and task-delete confirmation dialogs into a shared Tasks confirmation component with tests for button labels and disabled states.

title: Extract Tasks screen lint-clean helpers
description: Move grouped row construction and notification selection helpers out of tasks-screen.tsx so strict focused lint can run without local shadowing or baseline rule overrides.

title: Add focused Tasks screen shadowing regression test
description: Add a lightweight lint or unit guard around Tasks activity click handling and grouped todo rows so no-shadow regressions are caught before auto-improvement verification.

title: Reduce remaining Tasks no-unnecessary-condition debt
description: Replace closure-mutated search parser state and typed array indexing patterns in tasks-screen.tsx so the focused Tasks lint gate no longer needs a baseline rule override.

title: Make Tasks stat filters keyboard accessible
description: Convert clickable stat text in the Tasks header into named buttons with helper-tested labels so keyboard and screen-reader users can toggle blocked/timed-out filters reliably.

title: Add Tasks stat button focus smoke tests
description: Cover user-visible labels for header stat filter buttons so future compact toolbar work preserves keyboard semantics.

title: Expose task board refresh timing copy
description: Add optional last-updated timing copy near the Tasks refresh status so operators know whether the board data is stale.

title: Make task card selection controls keyboard accessible
description: Replace the Tasks card bulk-select click targets with named native buttons and helper-tested labels so keyboard and screen-reader users can select cards without opening them.

title: Add Tasks card action button focus smoke tests
description: Cover TaskCard launch, execute, selection, and menu button accessible names so compact card actions remain keyboard discoverable.

title: Expose task card queue status to screen readers
description: Add concise aria-label copy for queue position chips so non-visual users can tell why backlog/todo cards are ordered the way they are.

title: Add named action labels for scheduled job cards
description: Give Jobs screen icon-only card actions job-specific aria-labels and helper tests so run, pause, edit, history, and delete controls are screen-reader discoverable.

title: Add focused Jobs card action keyboard smoke tests
description: Add component-level tests that verify scheduled job card icon buttons expose keyboard-accessible names and do not regress to title-only affordances.

title: Show scheduled job stale-run copy
description: Add concise status copy when a scheduled job has not run recently so operators can distinguish dormant schedules from healthy recurring jobs.

title: Keep Tasks header stats readable on narrow screens
description: Prevent compact Tasks header stats such as blocked breakdowns from splitting mid-phrase or requiring horizontal scrolling by sharing a tested class token for wrapping whole stat units.

title: Add visual smoke coverage for compact Tasks header stats
description: Capture a mobile Tasks header viewport after blocked/timed-out stats are populated so responsive stat-row regressions are visible before deployment.

title: Reduce Tasks header className duplication
description: Move repeated responsive utility class groups in the Tasks header into named constants covered by focused tests, reducing accidental Tailwind token drift.

title: Add Jobs stale-run threshold settings
description: Let operators tune stale-run warning thresholds per scheduled job profile so daily, weekly, and one-off cron jobs use appropriate freshness copy.

title: Add scheduled-job health summary filter
description: Add a Jobs screen filter for stale, failed, paused, and never-run jobs so operators can triage scheduled automation quickly.

title: Show scheduled-job health summary filter
description: Add a Jobs screen filter for stale, failed, paused, and never-run jobs so operators can triage scheduled automation quickly.

title: Expose workspace service unit drift warning
description: Surface systemd unit-file drift in the workspace health/status UI when restarts report daemon-reload warnings, so operators know service configuration changed on disk.

title: Quarantine scratch root test files from default Vitest
description: Move or ignore root-level scratch tests like testCurrencyConversion.test.ts so pnpm test reports source regressions instead of collection failures from experimental files.
